name: sobe/faq
title: FAQ
description: Accordion-style FAQ block with animated expand/collapse.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on all items. Simply contact our support team and we'll handle the rest.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping takes 3–5 business days. Express options are available at checkout.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes — we ship to over 50 countries. Rates and estimated times are shown at checkout.
